task_completion.description: The FZK-Haus model is loaded and visible in Bonsai (BlenderBIM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender 3D viewport displays a detailed residential building model (FZK-Haus), and the outliner shows the IFC project structure.

task_completion.description: An IfcOpeningElement is created on the roof.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender outliner lists a new IfcOpeningElement, or a void/opening geometry is visibly placed intersecting the roof structure in the 3D viewport.
The Blender outliner lists a new IfcWindow element, or window geometry is visible within the newly created roof opening.

task_completion.description: The IfcWindow has its PredefinedType set to 'SKYLIGHT'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel under the Bonsai/BlenderBIM tab shows the IFC class as IfcWindow and the PredefinedType dropdown or text field explicitly set to 'SKYLIGHT'.

task_completion.description: IfcRelVoidsElement and IfcRelFillsElement relationships are established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai properties panel shows the opening subtracting from the roof (IfcRelVoidsElement) and the window filling the opening (IfcRelFillsElement), or the 3D viewport clearly shows a successful boolean cut in the roof filled by the window.

task_completion.description: The modified project is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or Blender's info/header bar displays the file path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_skylight.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Bonsai (BlenderBIM) GUI to perform the modeling tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Blender menus, using the 3D viewport, outliner, and Bonsai properties panels rather than just running a script.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FZK-Haus model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows the complex, multi-story residential FZK-Haus building, not a blank file, simple cube, or completely different model.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the IFC file in a text editor to bypass 3D modeling.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening the .ifc file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type out IFC entities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline FZK-Haus IFC file contains exactly 17 IfcOpeningElements before any modifications. The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_skylight.ifc. The agent must use Bonsai (BlenderBIM) to perform the modeling, specifically creating an IfcOpeningElement and an IfcWindow with the PredefinedType 'SKYLIGHT'.
